mapper.select: SELECT h.hospital_name,count(p.id) AS count FROM hospital h LEFT JOIN patient p on h.id = p.hospital_id GROUP BY h.hospital_name
SELECT count(*) FROM hospital WHERE hospital_level = '三甲'

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN patient_age BETWEEN 0 and 19 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)As A, SUM(CASE WHEN patient_age BETWEEN 20 and 29 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)As B, SUM(CASE WHEN patient_age BETWEEN 30 and 39 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)As C, SUM(CASE WHEN patient_age BETWEEN 40 and 49 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)As D, SUM(CASE WHEN patient_age BETWEEN 50 and 59 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)As E FROM patient
SELECT count(*) FROM patient WHERE patient_gender = '男'
